extract: Artazon (Japanese: ボウルタウン Bowl Town) is a town in the Paldea region, located on the border of South Province (Area Three) and East Province (Area One). It is known for its flowers and art. Citizens of Artazon have a particular fondness for the Pokémon Sunflora, which is featured in traditions and art installations around the town. Though the town is primarily contained within the East Province, a small portion in the west of the settlement is part of the South Province. Because of the local Gym's specialized type, the people of this town tend to walk around accompanied by Grass-type Pokémon.
